name: 3dSen VR
short_description: Built with passion for retro lovers, 3dSenVR turns iconic NES games into living 3D dioramas you can step inside. A fresh, heartfelt take on 8-bit nostalgia in full VR.
detailed_description:
About This Game

3dSenVR is a one-of-a-kind emulator that transforms classic NES games into fully playable 3D voxel dioramas, reimagined for Virtual Reality. Whether you’re diving back into legendary titles or discovering hidden gems for the first time, 3dSenVR brings your favorite 8-bit adventures to life in a whole new dimension.

Explore timeless platformers, deep RPGs, intense shooters, beat ’em ups, puzzlers, and more—magically reborn in immersive 3D space.

If you only want to play in PC mode, check out 3dSen PC instead.

You must provide your own roms as 3dSen VR doesn't contain any rom.

🎮 Highlight Features

  • Ever-Growing Game Support (100+ Titles)
    Enjoy a hand-crafted and expanding library of retro classics and modern homebrew.
    Includes—but isn’t limited to—Super Mario Bros, Punch-Out!!, DuckTales, Mega Man, Contra, Metroid, The Legend of Zelda series, Final Fantasy, Duck Hunt, Dragon Warrior, Batman, Castlevania, Battle Kid, Micro Mages, and more.

  • VR & Desktop Support
    Choose between full VR immersion or classic desktop mode.

  • Mixed Reality Mode (Meta Quest)
    Use your real-world surroundings as a dynamic backdrop for NES nostalgia.

  • Quick Save/Load
    Save your progress at any moment and jump right back in.

  • Rollback & Fast Forward
    Rewind to fix mistakes or fast forward through slow sections.

  • Motion Controller Support

    • Use your motion controller as a Zapper in Duck Hunt, Hogan’s Alley, and Wild Gunman.

    • Full motion control support for Punch-Out!!—dodge, weave, and throw punches like you're in the ring.

  • Intuitive VR Controls
    Navigate menus effortlessly using laser pointer or gaze-based UI.

  • Dynamic Skyboxes
    Surround yourself with rich, animated environments that enhance immersion.

  • Export 3D Scenes
    Save in-game views as external 3D models for creative or archival use.

  • Custom Cover Art
    Personalize your library with custom box art for each game.
